data.jd_text:
We are currently partnering with a leading, global SaaS organisation to appoint a Customer Success Director to lead their MENAT region. This is a strategic leadership role focused on driving revenue growth, customer retention, and long\-term client value across a portfolio of enterprise accounts.
 



**The Role**
 As Customer Success Director, you will lead a high\-performing team responsible for account strategy, growth, and customer satisfaction. You will work closely with senior stakeholders, building C\-level relationships and identifying opportunities to expand services and deliver measurable business impact.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Own revenue targets and ensure strong retention across key accounts
* Drive growth through cross\-sell and upsell strategies
* Lead, coach, and develop a high\-performing Customer Success team
* Define and execute strategic account plans aligned to client objectives
* Build and manage senior client relationships at C\-level
* Implement structured sales methodologies (e.g. MEDDPICC)
* Enhance customer engagement and satisfaction (NPS\-driven)
* Identify market trends, risks, and growth opportunities



**About You** 



* Proven leadership experience within SaaS / technology environments
* Strong background in Financial Crime, Fraud, or AML solutions
* Track record of managing enterprise accounts and exceeding revenue targets
* Experience leading and developing high\-performing teams
* Strong commercial acumen and stakeholder management skills
* Must be based in UAE



**What's on Offer** 



* Competitive salary and bonus structure
* Hybrid working model
* Opportunity to join a high\-growth, market\-leading organisation

data.jd_text:
We’re hiring a
 **Director of Data \& Analytics** 
 to rebuild and scale a data function
 **from the ground up** 
 within a high\-growth consumer business in Dubai. You’ll transform a manual, under\-leveraged setup into a production\-grade platform, while embedding analytics directly into Product, Growth, and Commercial teams.
 



  





 This is a
 **hands\-on builder role** 
 , owning architecture, deploying an embedded analytics model, and ensuring data drives real business decisions.
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 




  





**1\) Build the Data Foundation** 



* Architect production\-grade pipelines, data models, and infrastructure
* Establish governance, quality, and tooling standards
* Move from manual reporting → scalable, reliable platform
* Build with future AI / ML use cases in mind



  





**2\) Build an Embedded Analytics Model (Core to the Role)** 



* Design and implement a distributed analytics function
* Partner with Product, Commercial, Growth, Finance \& Customer Care to define needs
* Train centrally → deploy into business units
* Maintain shared standards, tooling, and a strong community of practice



  





**3\) Drive Commercial Impact** 



* Act as a true business partner, not a support function
* Work closely with Product, Growth \& Commercial leadership
* Ensure data drives decisions, not just dashboards



  





**What we are looking for:** 



* 12\+ years’ experience across data, analytics, or data engineering, including 3\+ years leading a data function
* Demonstrated ability to build data platforms from the ground up in high\-growth, fast\-moving environments, not just oversee, but actively deliver
* Strong experience implementing decentralised analytics models, enabling business units while maintaining consistency in data standards and infrastructure
* Deep technical capability across modern data ecosystems, comfortable owning architecture decisions, reviewing engineering work, and shaping data models
* Practical experience with leading tools and platforms such as Databricks, dbt, workflow orchestration tools, and cloud\-based data warehouses (ideally AWS)
* Hands\-on experience developing and managing experimentation frameworks, including A/B testing and performance measurement
* Prior exposure to consumer\-facing, marketplace, or subscription\-driven businesses, with a solid understanding of user behaviour, conversion funnels, cohort trends, and revenue drivers

*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Customer Success
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the \#1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level\-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a dynamic and experienced
 **Service Delivery Director** 
 to lead our professional services and customer success operations across the Middle East region. Based in the UAE (or KSA), this senior leadership role is responsible for driving delivery excellence, growing a high\-performing team, and ensuring customers achieve measurable outcomes from their investments.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to shape the future of service delivery across one of the world's most exciting and fast\-growing technology markets.
   

  

 What You'll Be Doing
   

  

 Delivery Leadership
   

  

* Own end\-to\-end service delivery across the Middle East, ensuring projects are delivered on time, within scope, and to the highest quality standards
* Define and execute regional delivery strategy aligned with global frameworks and local market needs
* Establish and continuously improve delivery methodologies, governance models, and best practices
* Drive operational KPIs including CSAT, NPS, utilization, revenue, and margin


 Customer \& Stakeholder Engagement
   

  

* Build trusted, executive\-level relationships with key customers and partners across the GCC and broader Middle East
* Act as an escalation point for complex delivery challenges, driving swift and effective resolution
* Partner with Sales and Pre\-Sales to support business development, solution scoping, and proposal development
* Present delivery performance and strategic roadmaps to C\-level stakeholders


 Team \& Talent Development
   

  

* Lead, mentor, and grow a diverse team of project managers, consultants, and delivery professionals
* Foster a culture of accountability, continuous learning, and customer obsession
* Drive talent acquisition, onboarding, and retention strategies for the region
* Partner with HR and global teams to develop career paths and succession plans


 Business Growth
   

  

* Collaborate with Sales on go\-to\-market strategies and new business opportunities
* Identify and develop service offerings tailored to regional needs and customer segments
* Contribute to revenue targets through effective resource planning and delivery efficiency
* Support partner ecosystem development and enablement across the region


 What We're Looking For
   

  

**Experience \& Qualifications**
* 12\+ years of experience in professional services, consulting, or technology delivery
* 5\+ years in a senior leadership or director\-level role managing regional delivery operations
* Proven track record of delivering large\-scale, complex technology projects (CRM, ERP, SaaS, or cloud platforms)
* Experience operating in the Middle East market — GCC experience is strongly preferred
* Bachelor's degree required; MBA or relevant postgraduate qualification is a plus
* PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project/program management certification preferred
* Deep understanding of Middle East business culture, government sector dynamics, and enterprise buying behavior
* English fluent mandatory; Arabic language skills is a strong advantage
* Willingness to travel across the region as required (estimated 30–40%)
* Existing network of senior relationships across GCC enterprises and government entities is highly desirable


 Skills \& Competencies
   

  

* Exceptional leadership and people management skills with experience leading multicultural teams
* Strong executive presence with the ability to influence and engage at C\-suite level
* Deep understanding of professional services business models (T\&M, fixed\-price, managed services)
* Excellent commercial acumen — P\&L management, forecasting, and resource planning
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with a data\-driven mindset
* Outstanding communication, presentation, and negotiation skills


 What Makes You Stand Out
   

  

* Experience in digital transformation programs at scale
* Familiarity with Salesforce, ServiceNow, SAP, Oracle, or similar enterprise platforms
* Track record of building delivery practices from the ground up in emerging or high\-growth markets
* Passion for developing talent and creating inclusive, high\-performing team cultures


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non\-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

**VP Customer Success \& Operations\- B2B Fintech \& Trading** 




  





 Our client is hiring a
 **VP Customer Success \& Operations** 
 to build a repeatable global operating system that supports scale, delivery excellence, and commercial execution across a fast\-growing fintech infrastructure business. This is a pivotal leadership role, working closely with the CEO and cross\-functional teams to productize the company’s offering, improve delivery capability, and reduce dependency on the CTO across presales, delivery, and launch operations.
 



  





 What you’ll be responsible for:
 



  





**Productization \& commercial packaging** 




  




* Convert a broad capability set into 2–4 flagship product lines with clear inclusions, exclusions, pricing logic, and implementation timelines
* Define standard deployment models across SaaS, private cloud, and hybrid, including the operational, security, and support implications of each
* Build product factsheets and sales enablement materials covering features, security posture, integrations, launch timelines, and support models



  





**GTM operations** 




  




* Own sales operating cadence, including CRM stages, forecasting, win/loss feedback loops, and pipeline hygiene
* Build a deal desk with clear pricing governance, discount rules, SOW templates, change\-order models, and margin controls
* Standardise presales solutioning so technical leadership is not required in every commercial conversation, using discovery templates, architecture diagrams, integration checklists, and compliance/security packs



  





**Delivery operations** 




  




* Build and lead a delivery function covering Implementation Project Managers, Solution Engineers, QA/UAT, and Release Management
* Establish and embed a gated delivery methodology across discovery, solution design, integration, UAT, launch, and hypercare
* Enforce scope control through acceptance criteria, delivery exit gates, and structured change\-order processes



  





**Compliance\-by\-design \& risk controls** 




  




* Own partner selection and integration readiness across key operational components
* Support liquidity aggregation and trading technology capabilities across crypto, FX/CFDs, and broader multi\-asset environments
* Oversee wallet/custody components, treasury controls, and tokenisation workflows where relevant
* Ensure operational readiness aligns with security expectations, access controls, and regulated client requirements



  





**Customer success operating model** 




  




* Build a structured post\-launch operating model covering onboarding, hypercare, monthly operational reviews, QBRs, and renewal/expansion motions
* Implement and track key metrics such as time\-to\-launch, incident rate, SLA compliance, adoption, and net revenue retention
* Work cross\-functionally to ensure a seamless customer experience from presales through to launch and long\-term growth



  





**Leadership \& operational scale** 




  




* Build a scalable operating model across GTM, delivery, and platform operations
* Lead cross\-functional operating cadence across Sales, Product, Engineering, and Support
* Drive consistency, accountability, and operational discipline across multi\-region teams and enterprise\-grade delivery environments



  





 Skills:
 



  




* 5–7\+ years’ experience in
 **fintech, trading infrastructure, brokerage, or exchange technology**
* Proven experience building or running
 **GTM, Delivery, and Platform Operations** 
 within a
 **B2B product company**
* Strong technical literacy across trading platform architecture, order and risk concepts, APIs, and market data feeds
* Deep understanding of multi\-asset operational environments, including digital and traditional asset classes
* Strong grasp of security, access control, and the expectations of regulated clients
* Experience scaling global operations across multi\-region teams and integration\-heavy enterprise environments
* Commercially minded with the ability to balance strategic thinking and hands\-on execution
* Highly operational, structured, and able to build repeatable systems in fast\-growth environments
* Confident working cross\-functionally with senior stakeholders across commercial and technical teams
* Comfortable bringing clarity, process, and accountability to complex delivery and launch environments
* Resilient, pragmatic, and able to operate effectively in a high\-growth business undergoing scale and transformation

data.jd_text:
**Job Title: Greater Gulf Medical Head, General Medicines**
* Grade: 5\.1
* Location: Riyadh (Saudi Arabia) or Dubai (UAE)
* Manager’s name: Alan DIVANOVIC
* Manager’s title: Key Markets Medical Head, General Medicines


**About Sanofi**
 Sanofi is an R\&D\-driven, AI\-powered biopharma company committed to improving people's lives and delivering compelling growth. We apply our deep understanding of the immune system to invent medicines and vaccines that treat and protect millions of people around the world, with an innovative pipeline that could benefit millions more. Our team is guided by one purpose: we chase the miracles of science to improve people's lives; this inspires us to drive progress and deliver positive impact for our people and the communities we serve, by addressing the most urgent healthcare, environmental, and societal challenges of our time.
   

  

 Sanofi General Medicines Global Business Unit Is Dedicated To Delivering Standard\-of\-care Medicines That Help People Manage Their Health And Relieve Pressure On Healthcare Systems. It Is Continuously Evolving To Stay Relevant To Customers With The Following Strategies
   

  

* Launching transformative therapies in the areas of autoimmune Type 1 Diabetes (aT1D) and Transplant.
* Growing core assets and increasing their reach with new digital health and AI\-driven business models.
* Coupling technology with clinical expertise to better understand patient needs, empowering them to manage chronic conditions.
* Rebuilding pipeline through internal and external innovation.
* Boosting omnichannel strategy for customers and patients, using data and Artificial Intelligence to personalize the engagements.


 The General Medicines Medical is primarily focused on aT1D and Transplant as core innovative areas, while continuing to maintain efforts on improving the day\-to\-day health of millions of patients with chronic conditions such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease.
   

  

 Greater Gulf (GG) is a Multi Country Organization (MCO) that includes Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman and Bahrein. It is one of Sanofi's eight Key Markets globally. Key Markets designate a select group of priority geographies that represent major business opportunity and growth potential for the organization. This designation reflects the strategic importance of the Greater Gulf region within the broader Sanofi enterprise.
   

  

**About The Job**
 As a member of both the Sanofi Greater Gulf General Medicines Leadership Team and Key Markets Medical Leadership Team, the GG Medical Head will develop and execute medical strategy and operational plans for innovations in aT1D and Transplant. This position requires aligning global strategy with local business needs while serving as an inspirational leader and catalyst for transformation in the rapidly evolving healthcare landscape.
   

  

 The role demands a forward\-thinking pioneer who combines deep scientific expertise with digital fluency, leveraging AI\-powered analytics, real\-world evidence platforms, and emerging technologies to transform medical insights into breakthrough strategies to accelerate patient impact and redefine healthcare possibilities.
   

  

 This leader will inspire and empower a high\-performing team while fostering a culture of continuous learning, technological curiosity, and adaptive thinking. Building the next\-generation capabilities \- from AI\-assisted medical affairs to digital stakeholder engagement – while maintaining the highest ethical standards and proactive compliance, ensuring that every scientific and technology advancement ultimately serves the purpose of improving people's lives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Shape the Future of Medicine in GG: architect the medical strategy, planning, and resourcing framework to ensure flawless, high\-impact launches of transformative therapies in autoimmune Type 1 Diabetes (aT1D) and Transplant — setting a new benchmark for what medical excellence looks like across Greater Gulf.
* Orchestrate Best in Class Product Launches: Define and execute bold medical strategies across the full product lifecycle — from pre\-launch through post\-launch — ensuring transformative therapies reach patients faster, smarter, and with maximum impact. Drive optimal lifecycle management across both innovative and established portfolios.
* Champion a Bold GLocal Vision: Craft and own a compelling, future\-forward vision for Medical Affairs across Greater Gulf, seamlessly bridging global strategy with local realities. Be the architect of a GLocal model that is agile, patient\-centric, and built for the speed of tomorrow's healthcare landscape.
* Lead with Strategic Influence: Drive strategic leadership for the Medical across Greater Gulf, co\-creating integrated action plans with cross\-functional partners that combine scientific rigor, business acumen, and an unwavering focus on patient outcomes.
* Build a Thriving Scientific Ecosystem: Cultivate a dynamic, future\-ready scientific ecosystem across Greater Gulf — forging powerful alliances with KOLs, external experts, HTA bodies, and health authorities — to cement Sanofi's position as the trusted scientific partner of choice in aT1D and Transplant.
* Catalyze Cross\-Functional Excellence: Lead the optimization and execution of affiliate medical plans that unlock full product value. Act as a unifying force across commercial, market access, public affairs, regulatory, safety, clinical operations, and R\&D — driving integrated, data\-rich plans that span publications, health authority submissions, and scientific congresses.
* Inspire, Develop \& Future\-Proof Your Team: Lead a high\-performing, agile medical organization built on a customer\-first mindset. Champion talent development, build a robust pipeline of future leaders, and foster a culture of bold thinking, continuous learning, and seamless collaboration with global Go\-to\-Market Capabilities.
* Harness AI, Digital \& Real\-World Evidence: Be at the forefront of the digital health revolution — leveraging real\-world data, artificial intelligence, and cutting\-edge digital enablers to generate breakthrough evidence and insights. Transform data into decisions that accelerate medical affairs performance and, most importantly, improve patient outcomes.
* Drive Smart, Responsible Resource Stewardship: Manage the country medical budget with strategic foresight and entrepreneurial discipline — identifying synergies, optimizing resource allocation, and ensuring every investment delivers meaningful impact for patients and the business.
* Set the Gold Standard for Ethical Leadership: Champion a culture of proactive compliance and uncompromising integrity — establishing the highest ethical standards for the medical function and ensuring every decision is grounded in patient\-centered risk/benefit principles.


**About You**
 Education \& Credentials
   

  

* Advanced scientific degree: MD, PhD, or PharmD (Medical Degree preferred)


 Experience \& Expertise
   

  

* 10\+ years of progressive medical affairs experience with proven impact
* Demonstrated success developing and executing medical strategy across Greater Gulf markets, with substantial experience leading high\-performing medical teams
* Established network of key opinion leaders and scientific influencers throughout Greater Gulf
* Track record of cross\-functional collaboration with R\&D, Commercial, Market Access, Public Affairs, Patient Safety, and Regulatory teams
* Deep understanding of Greater Gulf's evolving healthcare ecosystem and regulatory environment
* Thrives in complex, matrixed global organizations with ability to navigate ambiguity
* Hands\-on experience deploying AI, digital tools, and data analytics to transform medical operations
* Strong commercial acumen with ability to connect medical strategy to business outcomes


 Leadership Capabilities
   

  

* Visionary strategist who thinks boldly, acts decisively, and focuses relentlessly on impact over activity
* Transformational leader who creates compelling visions, inspires teams, and drives change in dynamic environments
* High\-energy self\-starter who contributes beyond functional boundaries and challenges the status quo
* Relationship architect who builds trust and credibility across diverse stakeholders—internal teams, senior leadership, and external partners
* Influential communicator who shapes thinking, drives alignment, and mobilizes action at all organizational levels
* Collaborative, open\-minded, and adaptable with unwavering patient\-centricity
* Lead by uncompromising integrity and ethics principles in all decisions


**Exemplifie The One Sanofi Culture And Values**
* Aim Higher: Focus on what matters, set high standards and move with urgency, learning from setbacks as we go to achieve higher performance.
* Act for Patients: Never compromise on integrity, eliminate barriers and partner with others to go faster and further for patients.
* Be Bold: Take thoughtful risks, seize opportunities and think beyond what's possible to accelerate our science and drive compelling growth.
* Lead Together: Build trust and collaborate openly on our shared goals, celebrate collective wins and foster a sense of belonging.


**Language Skills**
 Oral and written fluency in English. Arabic is a plus.
   

  

 Pursue progress, discover extraordinary
   

  

 Better is out there. Better medications, better outcomes, better science. But progress doesn’t happen without people – people from different backgrounds, in different locations, doing different roles, all united by one thing: a desire to make miracles happen. So, let’s be those people.
   

  

 At Sanofi, we provide equal opportunities to all regardless of race, colour, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, or gender identity.
   

  

 Watch our ALL IN video and check out our Diversity Equity and Inclusion actions at sanofi.com!

data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
 This role could be based in UAE and Hong Kong. When you start the application process you will be presented with a drop down menu showing all countries, Please ensure that you select a country where the role is based.
   

  

* Act as the second line Subject Matter Expert for Digital Assets (DA) as an asset class including advising across all relevant Risk Types (reputational risk, traded/market, treasury/capital and liquidity, operational, technology, cyber security, and credit risk).
* Lead provision of DA risk specific expertise to continuously enhance and maintain all elements of the DA Risk Management Approach (DARMA) which sets out the approach to risk management and the control framework within which risks are managed.
* Lead assessment of material risk types that the Group may be potentially exposed to arising from direct or indirect DA activities and direct Risk Framework Ownership to such risk types.
* Lead effectiveness reviews to assess relevant first and second line understand and accept their DA risk management responsibilities.
* Review and challenge that policies and standards are being adapted or created to address DA risks and training is available to staff (on a targeted basis).
* Review and challenge the assessment of DA Risk considerations in the Group’s Risk Appetite framework.
* Monitor that the Risk Framework Owners (RFOs) propose adequate risk appetite with DA risks evaluation for consideration and approval by the Board.
* Monitor Risk Type compliance to Board approved risk appetite with DA considerations using the risk information report covering all Risk Types; and highlight significant matters to the Group Chief Risk Officer (“GCRO”), senior management and senior risk committees.
* Review infrastructure to support DA reviews, and the monitoring of exposures and actions as required.
* Lead provision of regulatory interpretation for regulations classified as “Large\-Scale” with Framework implications. This also includes working with countries to support their regulatory requirements.


**Key Responsibilities**
**Strategy**
* Influence the Group’s DA Strategy and activities, advising on alignment with specific Risk Type framework, policies, standards, risk registers and risk appetite.
* Actively engage thought leaders in the DA industries to improve risk understanding, innovation, exploration, and adoption of alternative risk models and data sources.
* Conduct regulatory interpretation and associated assessments for DA related initiatives with adherence to legal and regulatory requirements.
* Evaluate and advise on risks associated with DA projects, products and investments, including the assessment of blockchain technologies and tokenomics, to ensure robust risk mitigation strategies are in place.


**Business**
* Inform the strategic intent and collective agenda for the DA Risk Management Approach
* Influence stakeholders and DA Risk subject matter experts on thinking and approach for Digital Asset activities, including situations where the Group seeks to engage clients heavily exposed to DAs
* Advise Business on alignment of individual DA activities to the Group’s DA business strategy and execution within the risk framework and parameters.
* Direct the business to undertake appropriate evaluations with regards to DA stress scenarios with support from the Group Treasury and Group Stress Testing teams as required.
* Provide timely advice, support and challenge to enable compliance with all relevant laws and regulations and support pro\-active and pre\-emptive risk mitigation.


**Processes**
* The Candidate is responsible for discharging Policy Owner related responsibilities as defined in the ERMF:
* Ensuring that processes within the DA Risk Management central function are identified and defined by Process Owners, and ensuring the completeness and accuracy of these identified processes; and
* Reviewing, challenging, and providing oversight of the DA risk profile monitored bythe DA Risk Management Function process universe.


**People \& Talent**
* Create a culture of continuous learning and development
* Foster an open environment to stimulate creativity and develop innovative solution to supports Group’s aspiration.
* Lead through example and build the appropriate culture and values.
* Set appropriate tone and expectations from the team and work in collaboration with risk and control partners.


**Risk Management**
**For DAs Initiatives, Lead Inter\-alia**
* Oversight of development of the risk assessment approach (DARMA) for any planned business direct exposure to DAs and/or entities heavily exposed to DAs.
* Required DA risk reviews:
* Provide subject matter expertise on DA risks and their interactions to core banking Business risks (across CIB/WRB) including capital and liquidity impacts, and traded and credit risk limits
* Review and challenge enhanced DA Due Diligence reviews on Business DA clients, products, initiatives and investments to enable adherence to DARMA.
* Evaluate DA risk assessments for confirmation by existing Business authorities including evaluation of blockchains and tokens, DA key management and wallet management infrastructure, operations and partnerships with DA third parties e.g. DA custodians, exchanges, staking providers etc
* Direct and review notification requirements to relevant regulators
* Oversight and challenge for the Group’s DA Risk Profile and activities including development and implementation of appropriate infrastructure to support DA reviews, and the monitoring of exposures and actions as required.
* Direct DA considerations in Risk Appetite by relevant Risk Framework Owners.
* monitoring the approved metrics through the risk information reports on an ongoing basis and that incidents of breach are being escalated by the relevant Business and/or Risk Type to the respective Committees.


**Governance**
* Run and maintain a governance forum/committee structure to provide effective risk oversight of the DA Risk Profile across the Group.
* Conduct annual effectiveness reviews to identify improvement areas and implement necessary actions.
* Lead review and challenge of on\-going compliance with and effectiveness of the risk control environment and overall exposure and risk levels to DAs
* Monitor top and emerging risks through forward looking indicators, taking into consideration to external events which may be material.
* Review and assess management action being taken to mitigate their impact.


**Regulatory \& Business Conduct**
* Display exemplary conduct and live by the Group’s Values and Code of Conduct.
* Take personal responsibility for embedding the highest standards of ethics, including regulatory and business conduct, across Standard Chartered Bank. This includes understanding and ensuring compliance with, in letter and spirit, all applicable laws, regulations, guidelines and the Group Code of Conduct.
* Effectively and collaboratively identify, escalate, mitigate and resolve risk, conduct and compliance matters.


**Key stakeholders**
 Internal
   

  

 Digital Assets
   

  

* Members of the Group Management Team
* Digital Assets Centre of Excellence
* Business heads
* Group and Country Risk Framework Owners
* Digital Assets SMEs
* Group Head, Internal Audit


 External
   

  

* Home and host regulators including Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) and Financial Conduct Authority (FCA)
* The Group's external auditors


**Skills And Experience**
* Traded Risk
* Digital Assets
* Credit
* Traded Risk
* Operational and Cyber Security
* Reputational
* Compliance
* Treasury


**Qualifications**
* Strong academic background
* \>15 years of experience in banking / financial services specifically capital, liquidity risk, traded and credit risk.
* \>15 years of experience in emerging Digital technology
* \>5 years direct experience in Digital Asset technology working for a Digital Asset Service Provider
* Deep expertise (at least 5 years) of evaluating financial and non\-financial risks associated with blockchains, tokens, CBDCs, stablecoins and cryptocurrencies.
* A clear understanding of novel risks in DA and how these risks manifest within relevant Risk Types such as Reputational, Traded/Market, Treasury/Capital and Liquidity, Operational, Technology and Cyber Security Risks, and Credit Risk.
* Broad experience across diverse business models within banking and Fintechs
* Strong expertise within risk management including governance and frameworks including proven verbal and written communication skills to the Board level.
* Thought leadership in digital\-related risks (Digital\-asset risk, technology risk, ICS risk, resilience)
* Strong understanding of Digital\-assets and fintech industry trends / developments, risk implications and impacts on the financial sector
* Knowledge of key regulatory and supervisory frameworks. Ideal \- direct experience of working closely with supervisors / regulators
* Strong stakeholder management, communication and influencing skills
* Excellent interpersonal skills, multicultural awareness and sensitivity
* Programme/project management
* Experience paper writing for senior level committees.
* Creativity and appetite for continuous improvement


**About Standard Chartered**
 We're an international bank, nimble enough to act, big enough for impact. For more than 170 years, we've worked to make a positive difference for our clients, communities, and each other. We question the status quo, love a challenge and enjoy finding new opportunities to grow and do better than before. If you're looking for a career with purpose and you want to work for a bank making a difference, we want to hear from you. You can count on us to celebrate your unique talents and we can't wait to see the talents you can bring us.
   

  

 Our purpose, to drive commerce and prosperity through our unique diversity, together with our brand promise, to be here for good are achieved by how we each live our valued behaviours. When you work with us, you'll see how we value difference and advocate inclusion.
   

  

**Together We**

**What We Offer**
**In line with our Fair Pay Charter,** 
 we offer a competitive salary and benefits to support your mental, physical, financial and social wellbeing.
   

  

* Core bank funding for retirement savings, medical and life insurance, with flexible and voluntary benefits available in some locations.

* A continuous learning culture to support your growth, with opportunities to reskill and upskill and access to physical, virtual and digital learning.

data.title: Chief Information Security Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Overview** 




 Our client is a long\-established, globally regulated financial services group with operations across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and beyond. The organization operates across multi\-asset brokerage (FX, CFDs, commodities, and equities), payments, and digital asset platforms, se
data.jd_text:
**Company Overview** 




 Our client is a long\-established, globally regulated financial services group with operations across the UAE, Europe, Asia, and beyond. The organization operates across multi\-asset brokerage (FX, CFDs, commodities, and equities), payments, and digital asset platforms, serving a large international client base within highly regulated environments.
 



 As the group continues to scale its technology, trading infrastructure, and digital asset offerings, cybersecurity and information security governance have become a critical priority at the executive level.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 The Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) will lead the group’s global cybersecurity strategy, ensuring the protection of trading platforms, payment infrastructure, client data, and digital assets across multiple jurisdictions. This is a highly strategic and hands\-on leadership role, requiring deep experience in financial services, brokerage, or crypto environments, with the ability to operate in real\-time, high\-risk, and regulated ecosystems.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Define and execute the group\-wide information security and cybersecurity strategy aligned with business growth and regulatory requirements
* Establish and oversee security governance frameworks, policies, and controls across all entities and jurisdictions
* Lead threat detection, incident response, and cyber risk management, particularly across trading systems and digital platforms
* Ensure security of trading infrastructure, including low\-latency systems, APIs, and client\-facing platforms
* Oversee cloud security, network security, and application security across distributed environments
* Collaborate closely with Technology, Product, Compliance, Risk, and Operations teams to embed security into all systems and processes
* Manage security operations (SOC), penetration testing, vulnerability management, and red teaming activities
* Ensure compliance with global regulatory frameworks (e.g., DFSA, FCA, ASIC, MiCA, GDPR) and cybersecurity standards (ISO 27001, NIST, etc.)
* Lead third\-party/vendor risk assessments, particularly for liquidity providers, PSPs, and technology partners
* Provide regular executive\-level reporting to senior leadership and the board on cybersecurity posture, risks, and incidents
* Build and lead a high\-performing global security team



  





**Requirements** 



* Proven experience as a CISO, Head of Information Security, or equivalent leadership role
* Strong background within financial services, brokerage (FX/CFDs), fintech, payments, or digital assets/crypto
* Deep understanding of trading platforms, financial systems, and real\-time infrastructure risks
* Experience operating in multi\-jurisdictional, regulated environments
* Strong knowledge of cybersecurity frameworks (ISO 27001, NIST, CIS, etc.)
* Hands\-on experience with cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern security architectures
* Demonstrated experience managing security incidents, breaches, and crisis response
* Ability to operate at both strategic and technical levels
* Strong stakeholder management skills, with experience engaging C\-level executives and regulators
* Relevant certifications preferred (CISSP, CISM, CISA, or similar)

**Company Overview**
 Kasumigaseki Restaurant is a premium Japanese dining concept in Dubai, offering an authentic and refined culinary experience rooted in traditional Japanese hospitality and craftsmanship. Committed to excellence, the restaurant delivers exceptional service standards through a seamless blend of precision, elegance, and highly personalized guest experiences. Since its launch, Kasumigaseki has earned notable industry recognition, winning Best Newcomer 2025 at the Hotel \& Catering Awards and receiving nominations for Best Japanese Restaurant at both the Time Out Dubai Awards 2026 and the FACT Dining Awards 2026, reinforcing its position as a distinguished destination in Dubai's upscale dining scene.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are seeking an experienced and dynamic Managing Director to lead the overall operations and strategic direction of Kasumigaseki restaurant in Dubai. This is a full\-time, on\-site leadership role responsible for driving business performance, maintaining brand excellence, and delivering an exceptional guest experience while aligning with headquarters' vision.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Oversee full restaurant operations, including service, kitchen coordination, and quality control
* Drive financial performance through revenue growth, cost management, and achievement of KPIs
* Lead and develop teams, including recruitment, training, and performance management
* Enhance customer satisfaction and manage relationships with VIP guests
* Develop and execute brand strategies, marketing initiatives, and business growth plans
* Build and manage relationships with local suppliers, including negotiation and procurement
* Ensure compliance with health, safety, and regulatory standards, driving continuous improvement
* Act as the key liaison with headquarters, ensuring alignment and timely reporting


**Qualifications**
* Minimum 5 years of management experience in the food and beverage industry
* Strong business\-level proficiency in English
* Proven experience in financial and operational management, including P\&L ownership and KPI management
* Demonstrated leadership and team management capabilities


**Key Competencies**
* Experience in fine dining or high\-end restaurant environments
* Strong understanding of Japanese cuisine and hospitality culture
* International experience or proven ability to manage multicultural teams
* Experience in new business launches, concept development, or brand building
* Strategic thinker with a strong business perspective and ability to make independent decisions
* Committed to both preserving brand identity and driving continuous evolution
* Proactive and resilient, with the ability to operate effectively in dynamic and uncertain environments
* Strong leadership presence with the ability to inspire, align, and develop diverse teams
* Ability to balance exceptional hospitality standards with strong commercial and operational acumen


**What We Offer**
* Opportunity to lead a premium Japanese dining brand in Dubai
* Dynamic, high\-performance and entrepreneurial work environment
* Competitive executive compensation and career growth opportunities

data.jd_text:
The Insurance Business Development Director is responsible for driving the growth and strategic expansion of Estithmar Capital’s insurance portfolio. This role focuses on identifying investment opportunities, building strategic partnerships, and developing innovative insurance solutions across traditional and digital channels.
 



 The position plays a critical role in aligning insurance initiatives with the firm’s broader investment strategy, ensuring sustainable growth, profitability, and market positioning across regional and international markets.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**1\. Portfolio Management** 



* Oversee and manage the firm’s insurance investments, partnerships, and ventures.
* Monitor financial and operational performance of insurance\-related assets.
* Develop and execute strategies to enhance portfolio value, profitability, and scalability.
* Prepare performance reports and insights for senior management and shareholders.



**2\. Business Development \& Investments** 



* Identify and evaluate new opportunities across:
* Insurance companies
* Insurtech platforms
* Brokerage firms
* Strategic distribution partnerships
* Lead end\-to\-end deal execution including sourcing, structuring, negotiation, and closing.
* Develop new revenue streams and scalable insurance business models.



**3\. Strategic Partnerships** 



* Build and manage relationships with:
* Insurance and reinsurance companies
* Brokers and intermediaries
* Financial institutions and banks
* Structure and negotiate distribution agreements, joint ventures, and alliances.
* Represent Estithmar Capital in key industry engagements and forums.



**4\. Market \& Industry Analysis** 



* Conduct in\-depth research on regional and global insurance markets.
* Identify emerging trends and opportunities such as:
* Digital insurance / Insurtech
* Bancassurance
* Embedded insurance
* Health and life insurance segments
* Provide strategic insights to support investment decisions.



**5\. Product Development \& Distribution** 



* Collaborate with partners to design and launch innovative insurance products.
* Develop multi\-channel distribution strategies including:
* Corporate partnerships
* Digital platforms
* Financial services ecosystems
* Drive go\-to\-market strategies for new insurance offerings.



**6\. Regulatory \& Compliance Coordination** 



* Ensure all insurance\-related activities comply with applicable regulatory frameworks.
* Liaise with regulatory bodies and supervisory authorities where required.
* Monitor regulatory developments impacting insurance and financial services sectors.



**7\. Financial \& Investment Analysis** 



* Conduct financial modeling, valuation, and due diligence for insurance investments.
* Assess profitability, capital requirements, and associated risks.
* Support investment committees with data\-driven recommendations and insights.



**Qualifications \& Experience** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* Minimum
 **12–15 years of experience** 
 in insurance, financial services, or investment management.
* Strong exposure to:
* Insurance business development
* Investment structuring and partnerships
* Insurtech / digital insurance ecosystems
* Experience within
 **investment firms, insurance groups, or financial institutions** 
 is highly preferred.
* Regional (GCC) market experience is an advantage.



**Core Competencies** 



* Strong commercial and investment acumen
* Strategic thinking with execution capability
* Advanced financial modeling and analytical skills
* High\-level negotiation and stakeholder management
* Deep understanding of insurance value chains and distribution models
* Ability to operate in a fast\-paced, multi\-asset investment environment



**Regulatory Considerations** 



* May require regulatory approval depending on the scope of insurance and investment activities.
* Must ensure compliance with applicable financial services and insurance regulations.

 Boosting asset returns by focusing on telco operations, towers, data centres, the sea cable business and fintech.



  




* **Strengthen the Core:** 
 Optimally using deployed capital and maintain an appropriate cost structure.



  




* **Evolve the Core:** 
 Monetising opportunities to generate new revenue streams via programmes focusing on analytics, digitalisation of operations, and partnerships with digital service providers.



  




* **People:** 
 Building an engaged and empowered workforce through integrated learning programs and coaching and mentoring.



  




* **Excellence in Customer Experience:** 
 Creating superior customer experiences.



  





 From day one, every employee who joins our team becomes an integral part of our success journey. We offer you the chance to enhance your skills, advance your career, and maintain a healthy work\-life balance. Empowering you to catapult your personal and professional growth. If you’re looking to challenge your growth potential, Ooredoo is the employer for you.
 



  





**Job overview** 




  




* The Director, Strategic projects is responsible for leading the planning, execution, and governance of the strategy’s most critical cross\-functional initiatives
* This role ensures that high\-impact projects are delivered on time, within scope, and in alignment with the

 The role holder acts not only as a PMO or project manager but as the project owner, driving the actual content and delivery of the project and providing content expertise in the relevant field.
 



  





**Your impact on our goals** 




  





**Strategic Program Leadership** 



* Lead the planning, structuring, and delivery of complex, multi\-stakeholder projects, including joint ventures, market entries, and major transformations.
* Define strategic objectives, milestones, and performance indicators in coordination with the
* Establish project governance frameworks, steering committees, and reporting standards.

 .

**Experience and Qualifications**

data.jd_text:
About the Role
 



  





 AlloyX is building a regulated, institution\-grade stablecoin ecosystem through AX Coin. We are seeking a Director of Risk to lead the enterprise\-wide risk framework, ensuring robust governance, regulatory compliance, capital and liquidity discipline, and effective risk oversight across all business activities.
 



  





 This is a senior leadership role with direct engagement with the Board, regulators, and executive management.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 • Own and lead the enterprise\-wide risk management framework, including risk appetite, risk limits, and risk governance.
 



 • Establish and oversee prudential risk measures, methodologies, analytics, models, and reporting.
 



 • Ensure strong alignment with regulatory standards (e.g. Basel III–style principles, capital adequacy, liquidity management, solvency concepts).
 



 • Oversee key risk areas including credit, market, operational, liquidity, capital adequacy, and balance sheet risks.
 



 • Lead stress testing frameworks, scenario analysis, and sensitivity testing.
 



 • Manage asset–liability management (ALM), portfolio allocation, and reserve risk oversight.
 



 • Oversee valuation practices across different asset classes and reserve instruments.
 



 • Ensure accuracy and integrity of data flows, financial reporting, and risk disclosures.
 



 • Produce and present risk reports for:
 



 • Board and Board Committees
 



 • Regulators and prudential authorities
 



 • Annual reports and public disclosures
 



 • Partner closely with Compliance, Finance, Treasury, and Technology teams.
 



 • Build and lead a high\-performing risk function, ensuring the right competencies, tools, and controls are in place.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Required Experience \& Expertise
 



 • 5–7\+ years of experience within a risk management function in financial services, banking, payments, fintech, or regulated digital assets.
 



 • Strong understanding of:
 



 • Enterprise Risk Management (ERM)
 



 • Capital allocation and liquidity management
 



 • Prudential supervision and regulatory expectations
 



 • Risk analytics, models, and reporting
 



 • Hands\-on experience dealing with regulators, auditors, and board\-level stakeholders.
 



 • Familiarity with portfolio management, ALM, reserve management, and financial risk controls.
 



 • Deep understanding of the competencies and operating model required to manage a modern risk function.
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Qualifications (One or More Preferred)
 



 • Financial Risk Manager (FRM)
 



 • Professional Risk Manager (PRM)
 



 • Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA)
 



 • Associate in Risk Management (ARM – The Institutes)
 



 • Professional qualification in Actuarial Sciences
 



 • Other equivalent risk or financial services qualifications
 



  





 ⸻
 



  





 Why Join AlloyX / AX Coin
 



 • Lead risk for a regulated, next\-generation stablecoin platform
 



 • Work closely with founders, board members, and regulators
 



 • Shape the risk architecture of a high\-growth digital financial institution
 



 • Competitive compensation and leadership visibility

data.jd_text:
We are a leading trading platform that is ambitiously expanding to the four corners of the globe. Our top\-rated products have won prestigious industry awards for their cutting\-edge technology and seamless client experience. We deliver only the best, so we are always in search of the best people to join our ever\-growing talented team.
   

  

 As the Head of Risk MENA (SVF), you will build and lead the independent second line risk function for Capital.com’s Store Value Facility (SVF) entity. You will set the risk direction, define the risk appetite framework, and ensure the business operates within approved limits while scaling wallets, prepaid cards, P2P payments, and remittances across MENA.
   

  

 This position carries regulatory responsibilities and is expected to be subject to regulatory approval where applicable. You will be accountable for risk governance, effective oversight of safeguarding and liquidity, and ensuring the firm’s growth is matched by strong controls, clear escalation, and Board level visibility.
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
* Strategic Risk Leadership: Define and drive the SVF risk strategy for MENA, aligned with the Group risk framework and the SVF business plan
* Risk Governance: Own the Enterprise Risk Management Framework, risk appetite statements, KRIs, policies, and committee governance. Ensure direct escalation access to the Board or its committees
* Regulatory Alignment: Lead risk engagement with the CBUAE and other relevant UAE regulators where applicable. Support regulatory submissions, inspections, findings remediation, and ongoing supervisory expectations
* Safeguarding and Liquidity Oversight: Provide independent oversight of safeguarding arrangements, client funds flows, reconciliations oversight, settlement exposures, and liquidity risk management. Ensure stress testing reflects peak redemption and operational disruption scenarios
* Product and Change Risk: Provide independent challenge for new products, material changes, and partnerships. Ensure risk sign\-off is a gating step before launch and that residual risk is within appetite
* Operational and Technology Risk: Oversee operational risk, including payments operations, fraud risk oversight, incident management, systems availability, cybersecurity risk oversight, and operational resilience
* Outsourcing and Third Party Risk: Set the third party risk framework and oversee risks from banks, processors, fintech partners, cloud providers, and outsourced operations. Ensure robust due diligence, ongoing monitoring, and exit planning
* Monitoring and Reporting: Maintain the risk register and control assurance approach. Deliver clear, decision\-ready reporting to senior management and the Board, including breaches, incidents, emerging risks, and remediation status
* Cross Functional Coordination: Work closely with Compliance, MLRO, Finance, Treasury, Product, Operations, and Technology to ensure clear ownership and no gaps. Risk owns oversight and challenge. First line owns execution


**Requirements:**
* Education \& Experience: University degree and 8\+ years in risk management within regulated financial services. Payments, e\-money, SVF, or digital wallets experience is strongly preferred
* Regulatory Knowledge: Strong practical knowledge of CBUAE expectations relevant to SVF and payment activities, including governance, safeguarding, outsourcing, and operational resilience. Prior regulatory approval in the UAE is a strong advantage
* Governance: Proven Board and committee engagement, strong escalation discipline, and experience running a second line risk function with clear independence
* Risk Technical Strength: Demonstrated capability across operational risk, technology and cyber risk oversight, third party risk, liquidity risk oversight, stress testing, and incident management
* Leadership: Ability to build and lead a high accountability risk function in a fast\-paced environment, and to challenge senior stakeholders without creating noise or blockers
* Integrity: High ethical standards, independence of judgment, and ability to meet fit and proper expectations. Professional risk qualifications (FRM, PRM, CFA) are an advantage


 What you will get in return:
   

  

* Competitive Salary: We believe great work deserves great pay! Your skills and talents will be rewarded with a salary that makes you feel valued and motivated
* Work\-Life Harmony: Join a company that genuinely cares about you \-because your life outside of work matters just as much as your time on the clock
* Generous Time Off: Need a breather? Our annual leave policy lets you recharge and enjoy life outside of work without a worry
* Employee Referral Program: Love working here? Share the love! Bring your talented friends on board and get rewarded for growing our awesome team
* Comprehensive Health Benefits: We’ve got your back with a medical insurance plan. Plus, location\-specific benefits and perks!
* Workation Wonderland: Live your digital nomad dreams with 30 extra days to work remotely from anywhere in the world (some restrictions apply). Adventure awaits!
* Volunteer Days: Make a difference! Take two additional paid days each year to support causes you care about and give back to the community


 Be a key player at the forefront of the digital assets movement, propelling your career to new heights! Join a dynamic and rapidly expanding company that values and rewards talent, initiative, and creativity. Work alongside one of the most brilliant teams in the industry.

**Optasia** 
 is a fully enabled B2B2X financial technology platform covering scoring, financial decisioning, disbursement and collection. We are committed to enabling financial inclusion for all. We are changing the world our way.
   

  

 Since company's inception, over a decade ago, we have grown to become a global leader in the Fintech fields, constantly expanding and adding new solutions, offerings, and untapped monetization opportunities for all our partners and clients.
   

  

 As a Procurement Senior Manager, you will be responsible for managing the procurement of products and services for the company's needs and the needs of the company's customers, finding cost\-effective deals and suppliers, and creating strong relationship with company's suppliers. With your expertise in the field of supply chain and logistics, you will be ensuring quality control and adhering to the company's policies and procedures on supply chain management.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Develop procurement strategies that are inventive and cost\-effective.
* Source and engage reliable suppliers and vendors, focused on sourcing Hardware, Software and auxiliary equipment, implementation contracts, SLA contracts and logistic solutions.

**What You Will Bring**

* Knowledge of sourcing and procurement techniques as well as a dexterity in "reading" the market

 Knowledge is shared, information is exchanged and every opinion counts.

data.jd_text:
**Department:** 
 Compliance
 



**Location:** 
 UAE
   

  




**Description**
**About Tabby**
 Tabby creates financial freedom in the way people shop, earn and save by reshaping their relationship with money. Over 15 million users choose Tabby to stay in control of their spending and make the most out of their money.
   

  

 The company’s flagship offering allows shoppers to split their payments online and in\-store with no interest or fees. Over 40,000 global brands and small businesses, including Amazon, Noon, IKEA, and SHEIN use Tabby to accelerate growth and gain loyal customers by offering easy and flexible payments online and in stores. Tabby generates over $10 billion in annual transaction volume for its partner brands and is the highest\-rated, most\-reviewed, largest, and fastest\-growing FinTech in the GCC region.
   

  

 Tabby launched in 2019 and has since raised \+$1 billion in equity and debt funding from global and regional investors, and is now valued at $4\.5 billion.
   

  

**About the role:**
 We seek a Head of Compliance for our licensed payment (e\-money wallet) entity in the UAE. The ideal candidate will be a seasoned professional with a proven track record of leadership and compliance expertise. This position will hold the critical responsibility of ensuring strict adherence to all applicable laws, regulations, and internal policies throughout our organization. As the Head of Compliance, you will play a pivotal role in maintaining the integrity of our business while proactively mitigating potential regulatory risks. Your ability to manage and motivate a team of compliance professionals, as well as effectively engage with regulatory authorities, will be essential to your success.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Implement, enhance, and maintain comprehensive compliance policies and procedures aligned with regulatory requirements set forth by the CBUAE, demonstrating a deep understanding of the applicable laws and regulations.
* Lead and manage a team of compliance professionals, fostering a collaborative and high\-performing environment, to effectively implement and monitor compliance initiatives across the organization.
* Conduct regular compliance assessments and audits, proactively identifying potential areas of non\-compliance and recommending corrective actions to mitigate risks and ensure adherence to regulatory standards.
* Provide strategic guidance and support to various departments within the organization on compliance\-related matters, including regulatory changes and updates, ensuring that all business activities are conducted in a compliant manner.
* Design and roll out efficient and effective compliance processes, leveraging technology and innovative solutions to streamline compliance workflows and enhance operational efficiency.
* Collaborate with internal stakeholders, including senior management, to integrate compliance considerations into all aspects of business operations, including product development, marketing, and customer service.
* Serve as the primary point of contact for regulatory inquiries and examinations, liaising with regulators and providing timely and accurate responses to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.
* Stay abreast of developments in regulatory requirements and industry best practices, conducting research and analysis to identify emerging trends and potential risks, and providing regular updates to senior management and relevant staff members.


**Skills, Knowledge and Expertise**
* Bachelor's degree in Law, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field.
* Advanced degrees and/or professional certifications in compliance (e.g., CAMS, CFE, CRCM, ICA).
* Minimum of 7 years of experience in senior compliance roles within the financial services industry. Prior work experience with e\-money institutions and/or payment service providers is particularly desirable.
* Experience in identifying, assessing, and mitigating compliance risks and developing and implementing effective risk management strategies.
* Familiarity with compliance\-related software and technology solutions.
* Experience with data analytics and reporting tools for compliance purposes.
* In\-depth knowledge of regulatory requirements applicable to FinTech companies and financial institutions in the United Arab Emirates, particularly those outlined by the CBUAE.
* Experience in mentoring and developing compliance talent.
* Strong understanding of anti\-money laundering (AML), combating the financing of terrorism (CFT), sanctions and other financial crime compliance requirements.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively collaborate with cross\-functional teams.
* Proven track record of implementing and managing compliance programs, including policies, procedures, and training initiatives.
* Analytical mindset with strong problem\-solving abilities and attention to detail.
* Ability to align compliance initiatives with the company's overall strategic goals and proactive approach to anticipating and addressing emerging compliance challenges.
* Strong alignment with the company's values and culture.


**Benefits**
* Flexible working model with trust and autonomy from day one.
* A high\-growth environment with ownership and responsibility that will accelerate your career.
* Participation in the company’s employee stock options program.
* Comprehensive health insurance.
* Flexi Perks: a monetary benefit to spend on what matters most to your health, well\-being, education, or professional development.

data.jd_text:
**About Us**
 French Spirit Coffee Shop is a premium F\&B company bringing the elegance of French café culture to international markets. We operate Ladurée franchises in Arabia, China, Egypt, and Morocco, and PAUL in Spain, offering luxury pastries, artisanal breads, and authentic French dining experiences. As we continue to expand our portfolio with more brands and locations, we are seeking a visionary Division CEO to lead our international operations and drive sustainable growth.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The Division CEO will provide overall leadership, guidance, and strategic direction for French Spirit Coffee Shop LLC. Reporting to the Group CEO, you will drive business growth, operational excellence, and organizational performance across all markets. You will oversee long and short\-term strategies, manage resources, build and lead the executive team, and ensure alignment with the Board of Directors’ objectives. This role requires strategic vision, operational expertise, and strong leadership capabilities, with some international travel expected.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Strategy \& Business Growth**
* Develop and execute high\-quality business strategies aligned with short\- and long\-term objectives.
* Make informed investment and expansion decisions to drive growth and profitability.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with key partners, stakeholders, and shareholders.
* Analyze challenges and implement solutions to ensure sustained business growth.


**Operations \& Performance Management**
* Oversee all operations and business activities to ensure alignment with strategy and mission.
* Develop and implement operational policies, sales strategies, and systems to maximize revenue and market share.
* Ensure the company meets its annual sales and performance targets.


**Finance \& Resource Management**
* Oversee fiscal activities including budgeting, reporting, auditing, and resource allocation.
* Review financial and non\-financial reports, recommend improvements, and manage resources within budget guidelines.


**Human Resources \& Leadership**
* Lead, motivate, and develop a high\-performing managerial and operational team.
* Ensure compliance with legal guidelines, in\-house policies, and ethical standards.
* Promote a positive work environment, employee engagement, and talent development.


**Project \& Brand Management**
* Plan, manage, and monitor projects, ensuring quality, timely delivery, and risk mitigation.
* Maintain brand standards across all functions, ensuring consistent customer experiences.
* Monitor food safety compliance, cost control, and operational efficiency across all stores and labs.


**Qualifications \& Experience**
* Proven experience of atleast 10 years as a senior executive managing multiple international brands and markets, preferably in F\&B or hospitality.
* Demonstrated success in strategic leadership, business growth and expansion, and brand management across geographies.
* Strong financial acumen with experience managing P\&L, budgeting, forecasting, and resource allocation.
* Expertise in operational excellence, project and risk management, and multi\-country compliance.
* Excellent leadership and communication skills, with the ability to inspire and motivate high\-performing cross\-cultural teams.
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Hospitality Management, or a related field; MBA or equivalent preferred.
* Additional certifications in leadership, project management, or international business are a plus.
* Willingness to travel internationally as required.


**Why Join Us?**
 Lead a dynamic, growing F\&B company operating globally recognized brands. Shape the future of the company, expand our international footprint, and deliver authentic experiences to new markets worldwide.

Ecomma is a rapidly growing private equity firm with proven expertise in acquiring ecommerce brands worldwide. We excel in a range of areas that drive genuine results and online growth, including:
 


* **Value Creation** 
 : Strategically investing to maximize the potential of our acquired brands.
* **Operational Excellence** 
 : Leveraging best practices and a seasoned team to optimize brand operations.
* **Sustainable Growth** 
 : Prioritizing long\-term success with sustainable practices.
* **Data\-driven Marketing Strategies** 
 : Using data to tailor marketing campaigns for optimal reach and conversion.



  





 We asked our current team members to tell us what they love about working at Ecomma, and here's what they shared:
 


* Supporting
 **top\-tier brands** 
 that truly make a difference in the world.
* Knowing the impact of our
 **expertise** 
 (check out our success stories).
* Connecting with
 **C\-level executives** 
 and leading e\-commerce businesses.
* Working in the world's most progressive industry at a firm that prioritizes
 **personal development.**
* Enjoying a
 **great atmosphere** 
 with fun team outings.
* Having the opportunity for
 **substantial compensation, including lucrative bonuses.**
* As
 **Chief Marketing Officer \| CMO** 
 , you will be the driving force behind Ecomma’s growth engine. Your mission is simple: build and lead a lean, high\-performance marketing machine that significantly increases the number of qualified leads entering our pipeline across the UAE and US markets.



  





 This is a highly commercial and performance\-focused role. You will take ownership of our paid media, email marketing, social media, SEO, events, and broader demand generation strategy, with the clear goal of doubling qualified lead volume over time. You will work closely with our CCO, COO and leadership team to ensure marketing directly supports sales growth and revenue outcomes.
 



 We are looking for a CMO with a strong online marketing and paid media background. Someone who understands how to win in high\-ticket markets, how to build a team, how to move fast, and how to use AI tools and workflows to create a lean and highly effective marketing department.
 



 Are you the next CMO ready to scale Ecomma to the next level?
 



  





 What you will do
 



  




* **Own Lead Generation Strategy:** 
 Take full ownership of the marketing strategy across the UAE and US markets, with the primary goal of doubling the amount of qualified leads entering our pipeline.
* **Drive Paid Media Performance:** 
 Lead and optimize performance across Meta Ads, Google Ads, and other relevant paid acquisition channels. You know how to allocate budget, test fast, improve CAC, and scale what works.
* **Build a High\-Performance Marketing Team:** 
 Lead the setup and management of a lean but effective team, including performance marketers, a social media manager, a creative/editor, and additional junior or intern support where needed.
* **Align Closely with Sales:** 
 Work side by side with the CCO and commercial team to improve lead quality, conversion rates, campaign messaging, market feedback loops, and overall pipeline performance.
* **Own Email Marketing \& Lifecycle:** 
 Build and improve email marketing across lead nurturing, follow\-up, reactivation, and broader lifecycle campaigns to increase conversion from lead to call to deal.
* **Own Social Media Growth:** 
 Build a stronger social media presence that supports authority, trust, brand awareness, and inbound demand. Translate content into commercial results.
* **Launch and Scale SEO:** 
 Establish SEO as an owned growth channel. Build the strategy, priorities, content direction, and execution process to improve long\-term inbound lead generation.
* **Lead Events and Launches:** 
 Own the planning and execution of events, launch moments, and other brand\-building initiatives that help generate attention, authority, and qualified commercial opportunities.
* **Implement AI\-First Workflows:** 
 Bring an AI\-first mindset to the marketing department by using AI tools, automations, and systems to improve speed, output, testing, reporting, and team efficiency.
* **Track Performance Relentlessly:** 
 Set clear KPIs and reporting structures across all channels. You understand that marketing exists to generate measurable business outcomes, not vanity metrics.
* **Improve Messaging and Positioning:** 
 Continuously refine our offers, campaigns, landing pages, creative direction, and growth messaging to improve qualified lead volume and performance across the funnel.
* **Create a Scalable Growth Engine:** 
 Build a marketing function that is structured, repeatable, lean, and able to scale alongside the company as we continue to grow.



  





 We operate using Google Workspace, Slack, and Notion. Thus, familiarity and hands\-on experience with these platforms are important for this role. The candidate should be fluent in English, with excellent interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills. A strong commercial instinct, analytical thinking, fast execution, and high ownership are essential.
 



 Tools in use may include Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, GA4, Google Search Console, Mailchimp and email tools, reporting dashboards, landing page tools, and AI platforms that improve output, speed, and efficiency.
 



  





 What you bring to the table:
 


* 5\+ years of experience in growth marketing, performance marketing, or digital marketing leadership, ideally in a high\-growth environment.
* Proven experience scaling qualified leads through channels such as Meta Ads, Google Ads, email marketing, SEO, and content/social.
* A strong background in paid media and online demand generation, with clear evidence that you know how to turn spend into pipeline.
* Experience leading and managing marketing teams, including performance marketers, creatives, and cross\-functional contributors.
* A highly commercial mindset. You understand how marketing should directly support revenue, sales performance, and business growth.
* Experience working in high\-ticket, lead generation, investor, acquisition, ecommerce, or similar performance\-driven environments is a strong plus.
* Strong analytical skills and confidence with reporting, attribution, testing, and decision\-making based on data.
* An AI\-first mindset. You actively use AI tools, workflows, and automations to improve marketing output, team efficiency, and speed of execution.
* Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple channels, campaigns, and priorities at the same time.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with sales, leadership, and creative teams.
* A hands\-on mentality. You are strategic, but you are also willing to execute, test, fix, and improve directly when needed.
* High standards, strong ownership, and the ability to build a lean and mean team that performs.
* Fluent in English with strong verbal and written communication skills.
* High ethical standards and a commitment to conducting business with integrity.



  





 The position will be filled immediately for the right candidate.
 



  





 Working at Ecomma is more than just a job. If you believe in seizing the present to enhance your future, you're in the right place. Combining hard work with the right atmosphere is our golden formula. We don't operate with a 9\-5 mindset, allowing you to manage your own working hours. We've found this approach yields the best results. Ecomma: a private equity firm you can count on.
 



  





 Please note: Proficiency in English is required.
 



  





 Does this opportunity excite you? Are you eager to dive in and unleash your creative finance mind? If you want to be a part of the Ecomma team, send your motivation letter and CV addressed to the respective job title application.
 



  





*If this role isn't a fit for you but you know someone it might suit, please share it with them \- we'd greatly appreciate it!*
